meaning: n.[植] 萝芙木属(热带有毒植物),[药]萝芙木碱(一种降压药)
examples: Any shrub or small tree of the genus rauwolfia having leaves in whorls and cymose flowers; yield substances used medicinally especially as emetics or purgatives.
Any shrub or small tree of the genus Rauwolfia having leaves in whorls and cymose flowers; yield substances used medicinally especially as emetics or purgatives.
